text.title: SLO Definition Template Per Service Class Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: classify-service
step.action: Pick exactly one class. If ambiguous, prefer 'most customer-visible'.

step.name: author-recording-rule
step.action: Add recording rule level:service:slo_good_ratio etc. Validate metric exists.
step.note: Gate: If metric missing, STOP — instrument the service first.

step.name: set-target-and-rationale
step.action: Pick target + 1-paragraph rationale. Window matches decision cycle.
